programName: Tucson Water Service Line Replacement Program
subsidyType: city-managed replacement at no cost when inspection confirms lead or galvanized requiring replacement
publicSideCovered: yes Tucson Water handles the utility side
privateSideCovered: yes Tucson Water says confirmed replacement is scheduled at no cost to the customer
propertyRules: eligibility depends on inspections confirming lead or galvanized requiring replacement and utility outreach
contractorRules: Tucson Water crews coordinate the work and contact the customer with next steps
